title: BigBear.ai Closes Ask Sage Deal As Generative AI Joins Defense Focus
text: BigBear.ai Holdings (NYSE: BBAI) has finalized its purchase of Ask Sage, a generative AI platform serving defense and intelligence sectors. The all-cash and stock transaction was valued at approximately $250 million. The acquisition strengthens BigBear.ai's product portfolio by adding generative AI tools to BigBear.ai's existing analytics and decision support offerings. Rather than developing this technology independently, the company now owns a platform already deployed with mission-focused users. This move positions BigBear.ai to compete more effectively against established defense IT firms like Palantir, CACI, and Leidos. The deal aligns with the company's focus on AI-driven solutions for government customers while potentially supporting conversion of its $376 million backlog into longer-term contracts. Management will likely highlight Ask Sage-related contract wins during the March 2, 2026 earnings call. Investors should monitor integration execution, acquisition-related costs, and whether the combined platform successfully competes for national security contracts—particularly given recent revenue pressure and expected near-term losses.
